sports.major_achievements: Competed in the 2022 Paralympic Winter Games with notable placements in multiple events.
sports.paralympic_participation: 2022 Paralympic Winter Games: 11° lugar en 7.5 km Masculino - Sentado (12/03/2022), 13° lugar en 15 km Masculino - Sentado (11/03/2022), 13° lugar en 12.5 km Masculino - Sentado (08/03/2022), 19° lugar en 7.5 km Masculino - Sentado (05/03/2022)

personal_data: Oleksandr Aleksyk is a young athlete, born in 2004, indicating a promising future in Paralympic sports as he continues to develop his skills and compete at higher levels.
